deck.name: Edgar Markov
deck.oracle_text:
Eminence — Whenever you cast another Vampire spell, if Edgar Markov is in the command zone or on the battlefield, create a 1/1 black Vampire creature token.
First strike, haste
Whenever Edgar Markov attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on each Vampire you control.

deck.name: Anowon, the Ruin Sage
deck.oracle_text: At the beginning of your upkeep, each player sacrifices a non-Vampire creature of their choice.

deck.name: Blood Artist
deck.oracle_text: Whenever Blood Artist or another creature dies, target player loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

deck.name: Blood Seeker
deck.oracle_text: Whenever a creature an opponent controls enters, you may have that player lose 1 life.

deck.name: Bloodline Keeper // Lord of Lineage
deck.oracle_text: No description available

deck.name: Butcher of Malakir
deck.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever Butcher of Malakir or another creature you control dies, each opponent sacrifices a creature of their choice.

deck.name: Captivating Vampire
deck.oracle_text:
Other Vampire creatures you control get +1/+1.
Tap five untapped Vampires you control: Gain control of target creature. It becomes a Vampire in addition to its other types.

deck.name: Drana, Liberator of Malakir
deck.oracle_text:
Flying, first strike
Whenever Drana, Liberator of Malakir deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on each attacking creature you control.

deck.name: Gatekeeper of Malakir
deck.oracle_text:
Kicker {B} (You may pay an additional {B} as you cast this spell.)
When this creature enters, if it was kicked, target player sacrifices a creature of their choice.

deck.name: Guul Draz Assassin
deck.oracle_text:
Level up {1}{B} ({1}{B}: Put a level counter on this. Level up only as a sorcery.)
LEVEL 2-3
2/2
{B}, {T}: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn.
LEVEL 4+
4/4
{B}, {T}: Target creature gets -4/-4 until end of turn.

deck.name: Indulgent Aristocrat
deck.oracle_text:
Lifelink
{2}, Sacrifice a creature: Put a +1/+1 counter on each Vampire you control.

deck.name: Kheru Mind-Eater
deck.oracle_text:
Menace
Whenever Kheru Mind-Eater deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles a card from their hand face down.
You may look at cards exiled with Kheru Mind-Eater, and you may play lands and cast spells from among those cards.

deck.name: Malakir Bloodwitch
deck.oracle_text:
Flying, protection from white
When Malakir Bloodwitch enters, each opponent loses life equal to the number of Vampires you control. You gain life equal to the life lost this way.

deck.name: Nirkana Revenant
deck.oracle_text:
Whenever you tap a Swamp for mana, add an additional {B}.
{B}: Nirkana Revenant gets +1/+1 until end of turn.

deck.name: Olivia Voldaren
deck.oracle_text:
Flying
{1}{R}: Olivia Voldaren deals 1 damage to another target creature. That creature becomes a Vampire in addition to its other types. Put a +1/+1 counter on Olivia Voldaren.
{3}{B}{B}: Gain control of target Vampire for as long as you control Olivia Voldaren.

deck.name: Patron of the Vein
deck.oracle_text:
Flying
When Patron of the Vein enters, destroy target creature an opponent controls.
Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, exile it and put a +1/+1 counter on each Vampire you control.

deck.name: Pulse Tracker
deck.oracle_text: Whenever this creature attacks, each opponent loses 1 life.

deck.name: Rakish Heir
deck.oracle_text: Whenever a Vampire you control deals combat damage to a player, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

deck.name: Sangromancer
deck.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, you may gain 3 life.
Whenever an opponent discards a card, you may gain 3 life.

deck.name: Stromkirk Captain
deck.oracle_text:
First strike
Other Vampire creatures you control get +1/+1 and have first strike.

deck.name: Vampire Nighthawk
deck.oracle_text:
Flying
Deathtouch (Any amount of damage this deals to a creature is enough to destroy it.)
Lifelink (Damage dealt by this creature also causes you to gain that much life.)

deck.name: Vampire Nocturnus
deck.oracle_text:
Play with the top card of your library revealed.
As long as the top card of your library is black, Vampire Nocturnus and other Vampire creatures you control get +2/+1 and have flying.

deck.name: Vein Drinker
deck.oracle_text:
Flying
{R}, {T}: Vein Drinker deals damage equal to its power to target creature. That creature deals damage equal to its power to Vein Drinker.
Whenever a creature dealt damage by Vein Drinker this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Vein Drinker.

deck.name: Viscera Seer
deck.oracle_text: Sacrifice a creature: Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

deck.name: Yahenni, Undying Partisan
deck.oracle_text:
Haste
Whenever a creature an opponent controls dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Yahenni, Undying Partisan.
Sacrifice another creature: Yahenni gains indestructible until end of turn.

deck.name: Marauder's Axe
deck.oracle_text:
Equipped creature gets +2/+0.
Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

deck.name: Coat of Arms
deck.oracle_text: Each creature gets +1/+1 for each other creature on the battlefield that shares at least one creature type with it. (For example, if two Goblin Warriors and a Goblin Shaman are on the battlefield, each gets +2/+2.)

deck.name: Door of Destinies
deck.oracle_text:
As Door of Destinies enters, choose a creature type.
Whenever you cast a spell of the chosen type, put a charge counter on Door of Destinies.
Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1 for each charge counter on Door of Destinies.

deck.name: Quietus Spike
Skullclamp
Sol Ring
deck.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}.

deck.name: Vanquisher's Banner
deck.oracle_text:
As Vanquisher's Banner enters, choose a creature type.
Creatures you control of the chosen type get +1/+1.
Whenever you cast a creature spell of the chosen type, draw a card.

deck.name: Vampiric Rites
deck.oracle_text: {1}{B}, Sacrifice a creature: You gain 1 life and draw a card.

deck.name: Shared Animosity
deck.oracle_text: Whenever a creature you control attacks, it gets +1/+0 until end of turn for each other attacking creature that shares a creature type with it.

deck.name: Sorin, Imperious Bloodlord
deck.oracle_text:
+1: Target creature you control gains deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn. If it's a Vampire, put a +1/+1 counter on it.
+1: You may sacrifice a Vampire. When you do, Sorin, Imperious Bloodlord deals 3 damage to any target and you gain 3 life.
−3: You may put a Vampire creature card from your hand onto the battlefield.

deck.name: Teferi's Protection
deck.oracle_text:
Until your next turn, your life total can't change and you gain protection from everything. All permanents you control phase out. (While they're phased out, they're treated as though they don't exist. They phase in before you untap during your untap step.)
Exile Teferi's Protection.

deck.name: Vampire's Zeal
deck.oracle_text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If it's a Vampire, it gains first strike until end of turn.

deck.name: Anguished Unmaking
deck.oracle_text: Exile target nonland permanent. You lose 3 life.

deck.name: Tragic Slip
deck.oracle_text:
Target creature gets -1/-1 until end of turn.
Morbid — That creature gets -13/-13 until end of turn instead if a creature died this turn.

deck.name: Urge to Feed
deck.oracle_text: Target creature gets -3/-3 until end of turn. You may tap any number of untapped Vampire creatures you control. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on each of those Vampires.

deck.name: Vandalblast
deck.oracle_text:
Destroy target artifact you don't control.
Overload {4}{R} (You may cast this spell for its overload cost. If you do, change "target" in its text to "each.")

deck.name: Vindicate
deck.oracle_text: Destroy target permanent.

deck.name: Call the Bloodline
deck.oracle_text: {1}, Discard a card: Create a 1/1 black Vampire Knight creature token with lifelink. Activate only once each turn.

deck.name: Disrupt Decorum
deck.oracle_text: Goad all creatures you don't control. (Until your next turn, those creatures attack each combat if able and attack a player other than you if able.)

deck.name: Kindred Charge
deck.oracle_text: Choose a creature type. For each creature you control of the chosen type, create a token that's a copy of that creature. Those tokens gain haste. Exile them at the beginning of the next end step.

deck.name: Merciless Eviction
deck.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• Exile all artifacts.
• Exile all creatures.
• Exile all enchantments.
• Exile all planeswalkers.

deck.name: Olivia's Revenge
deck.oracle_text: Unknown

deck.name: Read the Bones
deck.oracle_text: Scry 2, then draw two cards. You lose 2 life. (To scry 2, look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)

deck.name: Walk the Plank
deck.oracle_text: Destroy target non-Merfolk creature.

deck.name: Harrowing Journey
deck.oracle_text: Target player draws three cards and loses 3 life.

deck.name: Increasing Ambition
deck.oracle_text:
Search your library for a card and put that card into your hand. If this spell was cast from a graveyard, instead search your library for two cards and put those cards into your hand. Then shuffle.
Flashback {7}{B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

deck.name: Promise of Power
deck.oracle_text:
Choose one —
• You draw five cards and you lose 5 life.
• Create an X/X black Demon creature token with flying, where X is the number of cards in your hand.
Entwine {4} (Choose both if you pay the entwine cost.)

deck.name: Merciless Resolve
deck.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or land.
Draw two cards.

deck.name: Command Tower
deck.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity.

deck.name: Dragonskull Summit
deck.oracle_text:
Dragonskull Summit enters tapped unless you control a Swamp or a Mountain.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}.

deck.name: Isolated Chapel
deck.oracle_text:
Isolated Chapel enters tapped unless you control a Plains or a Swamp.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.

({T}: Add {B} or {R}.)
As Blood Crypt enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

deck.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

deck.name: Godless Shrine
deck.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {W} or {B}.)
As Godless Shrine enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

deck.name: Sacred Foundry
deck.oracle_text:
({T}: Add {R} or {W}.)
As Sacred Foundry enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

deck.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}.

deck.name: Wind-Scarred Crag
deck.oracle_text:
This land enters tapped.
When this land enters, you gain 1 life.
{T}: Add {R} or {W}.

deck.oracle_text:
Rakdos Carnarium enters tapped.
When Rakdos Carnarium enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand.
{T}: Add {B}{R}.

deck.name: Terramorphic Expanse
deck.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice Terramorphic Expanse: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

deck.name: Bojuka Bog
deck.oracle_text:
Bojuka Bog enters tapped.
When Bojuka Bog enters, exile target player's graveyard.
{T}: Add {B}.

deck.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {W} or {B}. Activate only if you control a Swamp.

deck.name: Tainted Peak
deck.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}: Add {B} or {R}. Activate only if you control a Swamp.

deck.name: Temple of the False God
deck.oracle_text: {T}: Add {C}{C}. Activate only if you control five or more lands.

deck.name: Kabira Crossroads
deck.oracle_text:
Kabira Crossroads enters tapped.
When Kabira Crossroads enters, you gain 2 life.
{T}: Add {W}.

deck.name: Stensia Bloodhall
deck.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{3}{B}{R}, {T}: Stensia Bloodhall deals 2 damage to target player or planeswalker.

deck.name: Transguild Promenade
deck.oracle_text:
Transguild Promenade enters tapped.
When Transguild Promenade enters, sacrifice it unless you pay {1}.
{T}: Add one mana of any color.

deck.name: Path of Ancestry
deck.oracle_text:
Path of Ancestry enters tapped.
{T}: Add one mana of any color in your commander's color identity. When that mana is spent to cast a creature spell that shares a creature type with your commander, scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom.)

deck.name: Vault of the Archangel
deck.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}{W}{B}, {T}: Creatures you control gain deathtouch and lifelink until end of turn.

deck.name: Exotic Orchard
deck.oracle_text: {T}: Add one mana of any color that a land an opponent controls could produce.

deck.name: Orzhov Basilica
deck.oracle_text:
Orzhov Basilica enters tapped.
When Orzhov Basilica enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand.
{T}: Add {W}{B}.

deck.oracle_text:

When Boros Garrison enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand.
{T}: Add {R}{W}.
